public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as road census clerk.
manner: Thinks in testimony, signatures, and remembered sequence, even when everyone else wants to move faster. In The Union, that reads as someone deal-aware, balanced, and procedurally diplomatic, with an eye on leverage and precedent, and the habits of a road census clerk still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of road census clerk in and around House Mal, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep House Mal workable through the obligations of road census clerk while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in The Union.
hidden_pressure: Must make memory legible under conditions that reward forgetting, misfiling, or selective recall. Around House Mal, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of road census clerk visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Arin March can trade precise, actionable information once the party secures or clarifies the record they protect.
Arin March needs help resolving a missing ledger, inconsistent testimony, or tampered record tied to House Mal.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Seals, ledgers, or carefully bundled papers make record authority the first thing Arin March communicates in public.

encounter_context.usual_environment: House Mal: offices, toll points, ledgers, archives, or testimony desks
who_avoids_them: those hoping wording can stay vague
